message:
chore(release): bump version to 5.0.5

Version 5.0.5 includes comprehensive documentation improvements that
make previously undocumented features discoverable to users.

## What's New in 5.0.5

### Documentation (no code changes)
- Added 8 new documentation sections (~386 lines) covering:
  - Safety Guards for AI Coding Agents (git_safety_guard.py)
  - Extended Agent Detection (12+ coding agents)
  - AST-Based Type Narrowing Analysis (TS/JS, Rust, Kotlin, Swift)
  - ast-grep Auto-Provisioning (5 platforms)
  - Maintenance Commands (ubs doctor, ubs sessions)
  - Test Suite Infrastructure (manifest-driven testing)
  - Auto-Update System (--update, --no-auto-update flags)
  - Beads/Strung JSONL Integration (--beads-jsonl flag)
- Enhanced Supply-Chain Safeguards section with pre-commit hook and
  minisign documentation
- README grew from ~2,026 to 2,410 lines (+19% coverage)

## Version History
- 5.0.4: Security fix for git_safety_guard.py bypass
- 5.0.3: ast-grep integration for var/division finding display
- 5.0.2: ARM64 Docker release
- 5.0.1: Initial Docker support
- 5.0.0: Major architecture overhaul

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
